role: PRODUCT ADAPTER — team-specific content only. Reuses the Premium Cinematic Gold Standard geometry/lighting/framing/hero/collage/footer unchanged; adds a team-color accent theme and team decorations via the documented DECOR interface.

theme.note: Team colors are ACCENTS over the fixed black cinematic composition. primary drives the central glow, particles, rim light, dividers, and script text; secondary drives the year, subtitle, footer, badges and shields. Background stays black; composition/geometry never changes.

roleMapping.headline: achievement/title (big caps, top-left) — e.g. CHAMPIONS (leading year auto-stripped so it never duplicates the Season badge)
roleMapping.tagline: {league or school}  (falls back to sport if no league)
roleMapping.name: team name (script over hero) — the SINGLE prominent placement of the team name
roleMapping.proud: team motto (script, bottom) — sport-aware default, customer-overridable via f-motto

teamNameUsage: Displayed once, prominently, as the script over the hero. The top-left script lead is the SPORT (not the team name) to avoid duplication.

mottos.note: Sport-aware default motto (bottom script). Customer can overwrite with f-motto; falls back to 'motto' default for unknown sports.
mottos.football: Leave it all on the field.
mottos.basketball: Leave it all on the court.
mottos.soccer: Leave it all on the pitch.
mottos.baseball: Leave it all on the diamond.
mottos.softball: Leave it all on the diamond.
mottos.volleyball: Leave it all on the court.
mottos.hockey: Leave it all on the ice.
mottos.cheer: Leave it all on the mat.

decorations.meaning: selected sport ball beside the season year

hero.label: Hero / team photo
hero.meaning: featured athlete or full team, cutout-ready
hero.placeholderState: When empty, the page shows a labeled preview-placeholder note under the canvas making clear the centered figure is replaced by the customer's uploaded athlete (cutout hand-prepared during concierge production).
